name: marketing-pipeline
description: Automated distribution pipeline for open source developer tools. Onboard a project from its README, launch to MCP Registry + directories, post to Bluesky/Dev.to/Hashnode/Mastodon, track engagement.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for draft generation (console.anthropic.com/settings/keys)

BLUESKY_APP_PASSWORD.description: Bluesky app password (Settings > Privacy > App Passwords)

HASHNODE_PAT.description: Hashnode personal access token (Account Settings > Developer)

HASHNODE_PUBLICATION_ID.description: Hashnode publication ID (query via GraphQL after setting PAT)

MASTODON_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Mastodon access token with write:statuses scope

SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Slack incoming webhook URL for daily engagement reports
